capability_boundary.coverage: Phase 5 US3 Theme only — T048 (manager.js) and T049 (manager-head.html). Covers Storybook manager chrome customization with PathAble brand colors and fonts.
depends_on: Phase 2 Foundational (T005, T006, T007) — main.js, preview.js, package.json scripts

task_text.T048: Create packages/styles/.storybook/manager.js with custom PathAble theme using @storybook/theming create(). Import { addons } from '@storybook/manager-api' and { create } from '@storybook/theming'. Theme settings: brandTitle: 'Pathable Styles', brandUrl: 'https://github.com/pathableai-org/styles', colorPrimary: '#00365c', colorSecondary: '#1cae96', base: 'light', fontBase: "'Nunito', system-ui, sans-serif", fontCode: "'ui-monospace', 'SFMono-Regular', monospace", appBg: '#f8f9fa', appContentBg: '#ffffff', barBg: '#00365c', barTextColor: '#ffffff', textColor: '#1a1a1a', textMutedColor: '#6c757d'. Apply with addons.setConfig({ theme: customTheme }).
task_text.T049: Create packages/styles/.storybook/manager-head.html with Google Fonts preconnect and stylesheet links. Include preconnect for https://fonts.googleapis.com and https://fonts.gstatic.com (for performance). Include stylesheet links for Fredoka (wght@400) and Nunito (wght@400;600) families. Preconnect links must appear before stylesheet links for optimal font loading.
task_text.T048_details: manager.js theme values: brandTitle='Pathable Styles', brandUrl='https://github.com/pathableai-org/styles', colorPrimary='#00365c', colorSecondary='#1cae96', base='light', fontBase="'Nunito', system-ui, sans-serif", fontCode="'ui-monospace', 'SFMono-Regular', monospace", appBg='#f8f9fa', appContentBg='#ffffff', barBg='#00365c', barTextColor='#ffffff', textColor='#1a1a1a', textMutedColor='#6c757d'. Apply via addons.setConfig({ theme: myTheme }).
task_text.T049_details: manager-head.html structure: two <link rel='preconnect' ...> tags followed by two <link rel='stylesheet' ...> tags. Preconnect: href='https://fonts.googleapis.com' crossorigin, href='https://fonts.gstatic.com' crossorigin. Stylesheets: https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fredoka:wght@400&display=swap and https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600&display=swap.

forbidden_actions: Do not edit main.js or preview.js
